description: The LegacyCheckbox component is used in old migrated content. This is a Legacy component and should not be used for new content. This should be replaced whenever possible.

fields.DriveField: The field to drive with this checkbooks state.
fields.AllowWriteBack: Whether changes to the target value of ``DriveField`` are sent to this component's checked state instead.
fields.Size: How big the check box is.
fields.BevelPercent: How beveled the check box is.
fields.Color: The color of the check box.
fields._shellMesh: The outer shell of the check box.
fields._checkMesh: The inner check box indicator of the check box.
fields._shellSize: The field to drive for the outer shell size mesh.
fields._shellBevel: The field to drive for the outer shell bevel.
fields._checkSize: The field to drive for the check indicator size.
fields._checkBevel: The field to drive for the check indicator bevel.
fields._colliderSize: The field to drive for the collider size.
fields._shellMaterial: The field to drive to set the shell material.
fields._checkMaterial: The field to drive to set the check indicator material.
